title: wireshark security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4.4.2-4.0.1.1]
- Fix post script to not fail during initial installation [Orabug: 37565359]

[1:4.4.2-4.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-130425 - Access of Uninitialized Pointer in Wireshark
